programs.title: The Nanny
programs.desc: It's Sylvia's birthday and Fran and CC find themselves locked in Maxwell's wine cellar.

programs.title: The Addams Family
programs.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love--a bearded carnival lady--that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the girl's mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programs.title: The Addams Family
programs.sub_title: Morticia and Gomez vs Fester & Grandmama
programs.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programs.title: Bewitched
programs.desc: Samantha has contracted a virus that has her talking in rhyme ...all the time.

programs.title: Bewitched
programs.desc: When Samantha decides to take up sculpting, Endora zaps up two talking busts of Darrin and Larry Tate.

programs.title: My Way
programs.desc: Tim Blackwell introduces inspirational Aussies, each with a unique story about how they live their best life. It's a lifestyle program that allows people to tell their own stories firsthand to say, 'I'm doing this My Way'.
